title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus and Accommodation Tour Event
text: Campus & accommodation tour 29 July SOLD OUT Event Status: Completed Date & Time: July 29, 2025 4:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. Accommodation tour Our student hostel is a home away from home during study at University of Southampton Delhi. Tour the peaceful residential Suncity location only 6km away from campus. Take the shuttlebus from campus, and then return back to campus when the accommodation tour has finished. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi hosted a sold-out campus and accommodation tour on July 29, 2025. Visitors explored state-of-the-art facilities and student housing at the Gurugram campus and nearby Suncity residential area.
